meta_title: For Founders: design with AI to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Design with AI to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your SaaS MVP faster.
content.answer_block: Overcome the 'no portfolio' hurdle by shipping functional, high-fidelity AI-generated SaaS MVPs. Use Antigravity to rapidly prototype UI components and Claude Code to automate backend logic. By focusing on live, interactive demos rather than static designs, you provide immediate, undeniable proof of your technical competence to potential clients.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. For a founder, the 'no portfolio' trap isn't just an inconvenience; it's a revenue-blocking wall that prevents you from closing your first high-ticket deal. You have the vision, but your lack of historical work keeps you stuck in the cycle of explaining your potential rather than proving your impact.

But the era of manual, pixel-pushing design is over. By leveraging AI-native development tools, you can now collapse weeks of front-end development into mere hours. This guide bypasses the theory and shows you how to synthesize a production-ready portfolio piece that looks like a million-dollar agency built it.

steps.title: Define the SaaS Value Proposition
steps.description: Before touching code, clarify the problem your MVP solves. A portfolio piece is useless if it doesn't demonstrate business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-fidelity landing page structure for a B2B SaaS dashboard including a hero section, feature grid, and pricing table. Use a clean, modern aesthetic similar to Linear.

steps.title: Generate Functional UI Components
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate interactive components that feel like a mature application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive sidebar navigation and a data-table component with sorting and filtering capabilities using Tailwind CSS.

steps.title: Automate State Management
steps.description: Connect the UI to mock data to show that your 'design' is actually a functional prototype.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a mock API service in TypeScript that handles CRUD operations for user profiles and project data.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a mock service layer to handle user project state'

steps.title: Implement High-End Visuals
steps.description: Add polish to your UI to ensure it stands out as professional work.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply a dark-mode theme with subtle gradients, glassmorphism effects, and professional typography.

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: A live link is worth 1,000 screenshots. Get your project on a public URL.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a script to deploy this build to Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure vercel deployment settings and export build artifacts'

pro_tips: Never show 'template' code. Always add one unique, complex feature—like a custom AI integration—to show you understand the full stack.
Use screen recording tools to walk through your live demo in a 60-second Loom; this is more persuasive than a static link.
Prioritize 'perceived speed.' Use Skeleton loaders for your AI-generated components to make the app feel faster than it actually is.
Focus on the 'Empty State' design. Most beginners forget it, but it shows you care about the user onboarding experience.
Treat your portfolio project like a real business. Create a 'Terms of Service' and 'Privacy Policy' page; it adds instant, subconscious legitimacy.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, iterate by adding a single complex integration (like Stripe payments or an OpenAI API wrapper) to transform your portfolio from 'pretty design' to 'functional SaaS'.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect client and start building the perfect proof of work. Your future revenue depends on the assets you ship today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
